title: EZ Actions
description: Radial menu that works with any mod & empty keybinds, multi-command execution, API calls, and much more
body:
[![Wiki banner](https://files.catbox.moe/8k3obi.gif)](https://z2six.dev/mods/ez-actions)

Support for 50 languages!  
支持 50 种语言！  
Поддержка 50 языков!  
¡Compatible con 50 idiomas!  
Suporte para 50 idiomas!

### Welcome to EZ Actions, a mod inspired by KeybindBundles and MineMenu but built from the ground up.

So, why this mod?

- Any keybind (including empty ones) for any mod just works
- Tons of features beyond just “keybinds in a radial menu”
- Extensive API for modders and modpack makers
- Stable architecture
- Polished, easy-to-use UI

Wiki (UPDATED):  
https://z2six.dev/wiki?mod=ez-actions&page=overview

[![Support me on Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-SUPPORT-FF5E5B?logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://ko-fi.com/z2six)
[![Join our Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-JOIN-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/EF6Wvkt7AK)

**Features:**

- Add as many items as you want: the radial menu scales up in size as you add more actions.
- Add keybind bundles to create menus inside of menus. You can also make separate bundles and give them their own keybind.
- Configure anything you want: remove animations, tweak sizing, deadzones… whatever you like. 😉
- Move, sneak, jump, and sprint while opening EZ Actions. Executing actions does
- Add multiple commands, configure delays, and choose between
- It should be easy to add, move, delete, or change anything you configured. That’s why there’s a dedicated menu editor that
- Easily export and import all your settings, so it’s simple to share with your friends
- Set a list of items (like a “loadout” in most MMOs) with the Item Equip action, which automatically equips items, fully client-side.

[![Wiki banner](https://files.catbox.moe/8k3obi.gif)](https://z2six.dev/mods/ez-actions)
